info.title: ScrapeBadger Twitter API
info.description:
The ScrapeBadger Twitter API provides programmatic access to Twitter/X data through a simple REST interface. Retrieve tweets, user profiles, followers, lists, communities, trends, and geographic data — all with a single API key.

All endpoints require authentication via the `x-api-key` header. Each request consumes credits from your account balance. Paginated endpoints return a `next_cursor` field that you can pass to subsequent requests to retrieve additional pages of results.

**Base URL:** `https://scrapebadger.com/v1/twitter`

**Rate Limits:** Requests are rate-limited per API key. If you exceed your limit, you will receive a `429` response. Implement exponential backoff and retry logic for production use.

**Credits:** Each successful API call deducts credits from your balance. If your balance reaches zero, subsequent requests will return `402 Payment Required`.

tags.name: Tweets
tags.description: Retrieve tweets, search tweets, and access tweet metadata including replies, quotes, retweeters, favoriters, edit history, and community notes.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Retrieve user profiles, followers, following lists, mentions, subscriptions, and search for users.

tags.name: Lists
tags.description: Access Twitter list details, list tweets, and search within lists.

tags.name: Communities
tags.description: Retrieve community details, community tweets, and search for communities.

tags.name: Trends
tags.description: Get trending topics globally or by location.

tags.name: Geo
tags.description: Search for geographic places and retrieve place details.

tags.name: Spaces
tags.description: Access Twitter Spaces and live broadcast details.

get.description: Retrieve multiple tweets by their IDs in a single request. Returns comprehensive tweet data for each requested ID including text, media attachments, engagement metrics, and all available metadata. Useful for bulk tweet lookups and monitoring specific tweets.

parameters.name: tweets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tweet IDs to retrieve.

get.description: Fetch detailed information about a single tweet. Returns comprehensive tweet data including author info, engagement stats, media attachments, polls, referenced tweets, and edit history. Use this for deep inspection of individual tweets.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response for fetching additional data.

get.description: Get the list of users who retweeted a specific tweet. Returns comprehensive user profile data for each retweeter with pagination support. Useful for analyzing tweet reach and audience engagement.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get replies to a specific tweet. Returns comprehensive tweet data for each reply including text, media, engagement metrics, and author information. Supports pagination for tweets with many replies.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get the list of users who favorited (liked) a specific tweet. Returns comprehensive user profile data for each user who liked the tweet. Useful for audience analysis and engagement tracking.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get tweets that are similar in content or topic to the specified tweet. Returns tweets that Twitter's algorithm considers related. Useful for content discovery and topic analysis.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

get.description: Search for tweets using advanced query syntax. Supports filtering by Top, Latest, or Media results. Use Twitter's advanced search operators in the query (e.g., `from:username`, `since:2024-01-01`, `min_faves:100`). Essential for monitoring, research, and content discovery.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string. Supports Twitter advanced search operators like `from:`, `to:`, `since:`, `until:`, `min_faves:`, `min_retweets:`, `lang:`, etc.

parameters.name: query_type
parameters.description: Type of search results to return.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of tweets to return per page.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get the edit history of a tweet. Returns all versions of the tweet in chronological order, from the original to the most recent edit. Useful for tracking changes to tweet content over time.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

get.description: Get community notes (formerly Birdwatch) attached to a specific tweet. Community notes provide crowd-sourced context and fact-checking for tweets. Returns note text, status, and creation date.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

get.description: Get tweets that quote the specified tweet. Returns comprehensive tweet data for each quote tweet including text, media, engagement metrics, and author information. Useful for tracking how a tweet is being discussed and shared.

parameters.name: tweet_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the tweet.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get a Twitter Article (long-form post) by its unique ID. Returns the full article content including title, body text, cover image, and author information. Twitter Articles are long-form content published directly on the platform.

parameters.name: article_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the article.

get.description: Fetch multiple user profiles by their numeric IDs in a single request. Returns comprehensive user profile data for each requested ID. More efficient than making individual requests when you need data for multiple users.

parameters.name: user_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of numeric user IDs.

get.description: Fetch multiple user profiles by their usernames (screen names) in a single request. Returns comprehensive user profile data for each requested username. More efficient than making individual requests when you need data for multiple users.

parameters.name: usernames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of usernames (without the @ symbol).

get.description: Get a user profile by their numeric Twitter ID. Returns comprehensive profile data including bio, follower/following counts, verification status, and account metadata. Use this when you have the numeric ID and need full profile details.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the user.

get.description: Get a user profile by their username (screen name). Returns comprehensive profile data including bio, follower/following counts, verification status, and account metadata. The most common way to look up a user profile.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username (screen name) of the user, without the @ symbol.

get.description: Get the latest tweets from a specific user's timeline. Returns comprehensive tweet data including text, media, engagement metrics, and all metadata. Supports pagination to retrieve the full tweet history.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username (screen name) of the user.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get the list of followers for a specific user. Returns comprehensive user profile data for each follower with pagination support. Useful for audience analysis and social graph exploration.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username (screen name) of the user.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get the list of users that a specific user is following. Returns comprehensive user profile data for each followed account with pagination support. Useful for understanding a user's interests and network.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username (screen name) of the user.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get the premium account subscriptions for a specific user. Returns the list of accounts that the user subscribes to for premium content. Requires the user's numeric ID.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the user.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Search for users by username, display name, or keywords in their bio. Returns matching user profiles with comprehensive data. Useful for finding accounts related to specific topics or interests.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query to match against usernames, display names, and bios.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get tweets that mention a specific user. Returns tweets containing @username from the latest search results. Useful for monitoring brand mentions, tracking conversations, and reputation management.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username (screen name) of the user.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of tweets to return per page.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get long-form articles (Twitter Articles) written by a specific user. Returns article metadata including title, body text, cover image, and publication date. Requires the user's numeric ID.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the user.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get detailed information about a Twitter list. Returns comprehensive list details including name, description, member count, subscriber count, visibility mode, and owner information. Useful for understanding list composition before fetching its tweets.

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the list.

get.description: Get tweets from a specific Twitter list. Returns comprehensive tweet data from the list's timeline including all metadata, media attachments, and engagement metrics. Supports pagination for lists with many tweets.

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the list.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Search for tweets within a specific Twitter list. Returns tweets from the list that match the given search query. Useful for finding specific content within curated tweet collections.

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the list.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query to filter tweets within the list.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get detailed information about a Twitter community. Returns comprehensive community data including name, description, member count, join policy, banner image, creator/admin info, and community rules. Useful for understanding a community before exploring its content.

parameters.name: community_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the community.

get.description: Get tweets from a specific community. Returns tweets posted within the community, filterable by type (Top, Latest, or Media). Supports pagination for communities with extensive content.

parameters.name: community_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric ID of the community.

parameters.name: tweet_type
parameters.description: Type of tweets to return from the community.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Search for Twitter communities by name, description, or keywords. Returns matching communities with comprehensive information including member count, join policy, and description. Useful for discovering communities related to specific topics.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query to match against community names and descriptions.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

get.description: Get current trending topics on Twitter. Results can be filtered by category: trending (default), for-you, news, sports, or entertainment. Returns trend names, tweet counts, and context information.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category to filter trends by.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of trends to return.

get.description: Get trending topics for a specific geographic location identified by its WOEID (Where On Earth ID). Returns location-specific trends including trend names, tweet volumes, and search URLs. Use WOEID 1 for worldwide trends, or 23424977 for United States.

parameters.name: woeid
parameters.description: Where On Earth ID of the location. Use 1 for worldwide, 23424977 for US, 23424975 for UK, etc.

get.description: Search for geographic places that can be attached to tweets. At least one of `query`, `lat`/`long`, or `ip` must be provided. Results can be filtered by granularity (neighborhood, city, admin, country). Useful for geo-tagging and location-based analysis.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-form text search for place names.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude coordinate for location-based search.

parameters.name: long
parameters.description: Longitude coordinate for location-based search.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific geographic place. Returns comprehensive place data including full name, country, place type, bounding box coordinates, and additional attributes. Use place IDs obtained from the geo search endpoint.

parameters.name: place_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the place.

get.description: Get details of a live video broadcast on Twitter. Returns broadcast metadata including title, current state, media key, dimensions, viewer counts, and timestamps. Useful for monitoring live content on the platform.

parameters.name: broadcast_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the broadcast.

get.description: Get details of a Twitter Space (audio room). Returns Space metadata including title, current state, creator information, participant counts, and scheduling details. Useful for monitoring live audio content and upcoming events.

parameters.name: space_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the Twitter Space.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: Your ScrapeBadger API key. You can find this in your dashboard at https://scrapebadger.com/dashboard/api-keys.

TweetData.description: Comprehensive tweet data including text, author info, engagement metrics, media, and metadata.

text.example: Hello, world! This is a tweet.

full_text.description: Full text of the tweet, including extended content beyond 280 characters.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

lang.description: BCP 47 language tag of the tweet content.

user_id.description: Numeric ID of the tweet author.

username.description: Username (screen name) of the tweet author.

user_name.description: Display name of the tweet author.

favorite_count.description: Number of times this tweet has been liked.

retweet_count.description: Number of times this tweet has been retweeted.

reply_count.description: Number of replies to this tweet.

quote_count.description: Number of times this tweet has been quoted.

view_count.description: Number of times this tweet has been viewed.

bookmark_count.description: Number of times this tweet has been bookmarked.

favorited.description: Whether the authenticated user has liked this tweet.

retweeted.description: Whether the authenticated user has retweeted this tweet.

bookmarked.description: Whether the authenticated user has bookmarked this tweet.

possibly_sensitive.description: Whether the tweet is flagged as possibly containing sensitive content.

is_quote_status.description: Whether the tweet is a quote tweet.

is_retweet.description: Whether the tweet is a retweet.

conversation_id.description: ID of the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.

in_reply_to_status_id.description: ID of the tweet this is a reply to, if applicable.

in_reply_to_user_id.description: ID of the user this tweet is replying to.

poll.description: Poll data if the tweet contains a poll.

place.description: Geographic place associated with the tweet.

quoted_status_id.description: ID of the quoted tweet, if this is a quote tweet.

retweeted_status_id.description: ID of the original tweet, if this is a retweet.

edit_tweet_ids.description: List of tweet IDs in the edit chain.

editable_until_msecs.description: Timestamp (milliseconds) until the tweet can be edited.

is_edit_eligible.description: Whether the tweet is eligible for editing.

has_card.description: Whether the tweet has a link preview card.

thumbnail_url.description: URL of the link preview thumbnail.

thumbnail_title.description: Title of the link preview card.

has_community_notes.description: Whether the tweet has community notes attached.

source.description: Client application used to post the tweet.

UserData.description: Comprehensive user profile data including bio, metrics, verification status, and account metadata.

profile_image_url.description: URL of the user's profile image.

profile_banner_url.description: URL of the user's profile banner.

following_count.description: Number of accounts this user follows.

listed_count.description: Number of lists this user appears on.

favourites_count.description: Number of tweets this user has liked.

verified.description: Whether the user is verified (legacy verification).

is_blue_verified.description: Whether the user has a Twitter Blue/Premium subscription.

created_at_datetime.description: Account creation date in ISO 8601 format.

protected.description: Whether the user's tweets are protected (private).

possibly_sensitive.description: Whether the user's content may be sensitive.

followed_by.description: Whether this user follows the authenticated user.

following.description: Whether the authenticated user follows this user.

can_dm.description: Whether the authenticated user can send a DM to this user.

pinned_tweet_ids.description: IDs of the user's pinned tweets.

Media.description: Media attachment in a tweet (photo, video, or animated GIF).

width.description: Width of the media in pixels.

height.description: Height of the media in pixels.

alt_text.description: Alt text description of the media.

URL.description: URL entity in a tweet or user profile.

unwound_url.description: Fully resolved URL after following redirects.

indices.description: Start and end positions of the hashtag in the tweet text.

UserMention.description: User mention entity in a tweet.

id.description: Numeric ID of the mentioned user.

name.description: Display name of the mentioned user.

indices.description: Start and end positions of the mention in the tweet text.

end_datetime.description: When the poll ends or ended.

duration_minutes.description: Total duration of the poll in minutes.

PollOption.description: A single poll option with its vote count.

label.description: Text label of the poll option.

votes.description: Number of votes for this option.

Place.description: Geographic place information attached to a tweet.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the list was created.

member_count.description: Number of members in the list.

subscriber_count.description: Number of subscribers to the list.

user_id.description: Numeric ID of the list owner.

is_member.description: Whether the authenticated user is a member.

is_nsfw.description: Whether the community is marked as NSFW.

creator_id.description: Numeric ID of the community creator.

creator_name.description: Display name of the community creator.

admin_id.description: Numeric ID of the community admin.

admin_name.description: Display name of the community admin.

width.description: Width of the banner in pixels.

height.description: Height of the banner in pixels.

name.description: Name of the trending topic or hashtag.

url.description: Twitter search URL for this trend.

query.description: Search query string for this trend.

tweet_count.description: Approximate number of tweets about this trend.

PlaceTrendsData.description: Trending topics for a specific geographic location.

woeid.description: Where On Earth ID of the location.

trends.description: List of trending topics at this location.

coordinates.description: Array of coordinate arrays defining the bounding box.

text.description: Full body text of the article.

cover_image_url.description: URL of the article's cover image.

author_id.description: Numeric ID of the article author.

author_name.description: Display name of the article author.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the article was published.

text.description: Text content of the community note.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the note was created.

state.description: Current state of the Space (e.g., live, scheduled, ended).

created_at.description: Timestamp when the Space was created.

creator_id.description: Numeric ID of the Space creator.

creator_name.description: Display name of the Space creator.

total_participated.description: Total number of users who participated.

is_ticketed.description: Whether the Space requires a ticket.

scheduled_start.description: Scheduled start time for upcoming Spaces.

state.description: Current state of the broadcast (e.g., running, ended).

media_key.description: Media key for the broadcast stream.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the broadcast was created.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page. Null if no more results.
Cursor for fetching the next page. Null if no more results.
Cursor for fetching the next page. Null if no more results.
Cursor for fetching the next page. Null if no more results.

CommunityNotesResponse.description: List of community notes for a tweet.

ErrorResponse.description: Error response returned for failed requests.

error.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication failed. The API key is missing, invalid, or expired.

PaymentRequired.description: Insufficient credits. Your account balance has been exhausted. Purchase more credits at https://scrapebadger.com/dashboard/billing.

RateLimitExceeded.description: Rate limit exceeded. Too many requests in a given time period. Implement exponential backoff and retry.

example.error: Rate limit exceeded. Please retry after a short delay.
